title: gelseminum jasminoides
intro: Gelseminum jasminoides, also known as Chinese jasmine or gelsemium, is a perennial flowering plant native to Asia. The plant's root and other parts are used in traditional medicine, particularly for their sedative and antispasmodic properties. Gelsemium has been used to treat a range of health issues, including insomnia, anxiety, and muscle spasms, and is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties. Herbal preparations of gelsemium include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of stress and promote relaxation.
